Package glide.api.models.configuration

Class IamAuthConfig

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.configuration.IamAuthConfig
  • public class IamAuthConfig
extends java.lang.Object
    Configuration settings for IAM authentication.
    Example:
    
 IamAuthConfig iamConfig = IamAuthConfig.builder()
     .clusterName("my-cluster")
     .service(ServiceType.ELASTICACHE)
     .region("us-east-1")
     .refreshIntervalSeconds(300)
     .build();

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  IamAuthConfig.IamAuthConfigBuilder  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static IamAuthConfig.IamAuthConfigBuilder builder()  
      @NonNull java.lang.String getClusterName()
      The name of the ElastiCache/MemoryDB cluster.
      java.lang.Integer getRefreshIntervalSeconds()
      Optional refresh interval in seconds for renewing IAM authentication tokens.
      @NonNull java.lang.String getRegion()
      The AWS region where the ElastiCache/MemoryDB cluster is located.
      @NonNull ServiceType getService()
      The type of service being used (ElastiCache or MemoryDB).

      • builder

        public static IamAuthConfig.IamAuthConfigBuilder builder()

      • getClusterName

        @NonNull
public @NonNull java.lang.String getClusterName()
        The name of the ElastiCache/MemoryDB cluster.

      • getService

        @NonNull
public @NonNull ServiceType getService()
        The type of service being used (ElastiCache or MemoryDB).

      • getRegion

        @NonNull
public @NonNull java.lang.String getRegion()
        The AWS region where the ElastiCache/MemoryDB cluster is located.

      • getRefreshIntervalSeconds

        public java.lang.Integer getRefreshIntervalSeconds()
        Optional refresh interval in seconds for renewing IAM authentication tokens. If not provided, defaults to 300 seconds (5 min).
